properties.name: application.version
properties.description: Current application version according to pom.xml

properties.name: file.resume-filepath
properties.description: File path to the resume file

properties.name: contact.email
properties.description: Mail to address for contact form submissions

properties.name: contact.prefix
properties.description: A prefix to add to the subject of contact form emails

properties.name: settings.cors_origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of allowed CORS origins (e.g. https://example.com,https://www.example.com)
